message:
fix(cli): handle JSON error responses from friendly parse error formatter

When format_friendly_parse_error returns a JSON object (for --json mode),
we now detect this and construct a proper CliError with the JSON as the
message directly, rather than wrapping it in another error format.

This fixes cases where JSON consumers would receive improperly nested
error structures when argument parsing failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
